_comment: Self-contained CSV-only STROKE TIRP pipeline. Reproduces pipeline_stroke.py exactly (K/Y sliding windows, YES/NO cohorts, 3x controls, _YES_patterns/_NO_patterns output) but selects cohorts from data/raw_events.csv and runs the engines off CSV with no database.

window._note: K = observation window (Mediator abstracts here). Y = outcome window right after K (y_start=k_end, y_end=y_start+Y) used to label YES/NO. Slides by STEP until y_end passes END_DATE.

cohort._note: YES = patients whose STROKE_CONCEPT event falls in the Y-window. NO = NO_RATIO x |YES| patients who never had STROKE_CONCEPT, sampled with SEED. The original SQL pipeline samples NO randomly (ORDER BY NEWID()) so NO is non-reproducible there; SEED makes CSV mode reproducible. YES is deterministic in both.

karmalego._concepts_note: Restricted 68-concept stroke list (matches config_stroke.json). Set to "*" to mine ALL concepts.

project._note: projects.csv maps 40144 -> Kb_ID 2700; concept definitions load from tak_entities/2700 (no DB).
